title: Vanilla Sky: Everything From Nothing
body:
![small spawn platform with grass, both types of nylium, and a tree](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jsorrell/CarpetSkyAdditions/HEAD/docs/screenshots/spawn_platform.png)

* **Spawn on a small grass island with an Oak Tree.**
* Kill Zombies to get Iron to craft a Cauldron to catch rainwater.
* Use Lightning to Electrocute Pigs into Zombified Piglins for Gold.
* Convert a Vex into an Allay with Music.
* **Every Block, Item, Enchantment, Mob, and Advancement is obtainable, using almost exclusively Vanilla mechanics.**

This modpack aims to provide an expert-level SkyBlock style gameplay aimed at technical players. Survival depends on players' knowledge of Minecraft mechanics.
It was originally inspired by ilmango's 1.14 SkyBlock series.

Additional advancements are provided to help guide progression.

In some cases, outside tools such as [Chunkbase](https://www.chunkbase.com/) will be helpful.
Usage of these is encouraged.
Sometimes extended grinding or AFKing will be required for progression.

This modpack is centered around the mod [Carpet Sky Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-sky-additions).

Find more information and progression hints on the GitHub page for the mod: [https://github.com/jsorrell/CarpetSkyAdditions](https://github.com/jsorrell/CarpetSkyAdditions)
